title: The Impact of Voice Search on Video SEO Strategies
excerpt: Voice search queries are inherently conversational and action-oriented. Discover how to adapt your video titles and descriptions to capture this growing demographic.
author: Corey Spicer
content:
With the rise of smart speakers and in-car AI assistants, voice search is fundamentally changing how people seek information.

Conversational Optimization

Voice searches are usually full sentences: "How do I fix a leaking sink pipe?" Target these exact phrases in your video titles. Your video should open by repeating the question and immediately demonstrating the solution. AEO engines prioritize content that directly mirrors the structure of the voice query.
